title: Mellstroy Mod
description: Play with Mellstroy and test your luck in the slot machine!
body:
# Who is Mellstroy
### Mellstroy is a famous Russian streamer known for his casino streams

## Mellstroy
- Health 20 HP
- Attack Damage 2 HP per hit
- Speed 0.3
- Behavior Neutral until attacked then aggressive

## How to spawn Mellstroy
- Place a gold block
- Stand within 10 blocks of it
- Type in chat three times "What kind of business is this, bitch" in English
or "Что за бизнес, сука" in Russian
- Mellstroy appears on the gold block
- The gold block disappears

## Drop
- 1 MellGem after death

## ITEMS

- MellGem A rare item dropped by Mellstroy
- Used to craft the Slot Machine
- Stacks up to 64

- Hat Grants the Politeness effect when used on the ground near Mellstroy Can also be eaten to apply the effect to yourself
- Stacks up to 16

1. - Slot Machine Symbols
1. - Fruit
1. - Gummy Bear
1. - Dog

- The slot machine can only be used if Mellstroy is near it

## EFFECTS

- Politeness Changes all Mellstroy voice lines to polite versions

- Gambling Addiction (Ludomania)
- How to get: Mellstroy picks up a diamond near you within 8 blocks
- Duration 5 minutes
- Effect 90 percent win chance in the slot machine

## SLOT MACHINE

## Crafting Recipe
- 8 iron blocks around a MellGem MellGem in the center equals 1 Slot Machine

## How to use
- Place the slot machine
- Mellstroy must be within 30 blocks
- Right click to open the interface
- Press the "Start" button
- Wait 3 seconds for the reels to spin
- 2 second delay before result
- Win or lose

## Winning conditions
- All 3 symbols match
- Reward 3 identical items plus 16 diamonds
- Win chance about 11 percent
- With Gambling Addiction 90 percent

## Features
- 30 second cooldown between spins
- Spinning animation
- Independent reel stopping
- No empty slots

### ACHIEVEMENTS

1. "What kind of business is this, bitch" Summon Mellstroy
1. "Mellstroy.game" Obtain MellGem
1. "Dodep" Craft the Slot Machine
1. "40 MILLION" Win in the Slot Machine hard achievement
